data.description: The equipping of troops with unmanned systems will become one of the priorities in 2026, said Dmitry Medvedev.

data.title: Faraday Future stock (FFAI) rose as its Middle East subsidiary partnered with RAK Innovation City for AI, Web3, and digital economy projects.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) witnessed a boost in its stock value on Wednesday following the announcement that its Middle East subsidiary has signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with RAK Digital Assets Oasis, also referred to as RAK Innovation City. The outlined agreement focuses on cooperation in three main areas: artificial intelligence (AI), Web3, digital economy, and embodied intelligence. Through this partnership, Faraday Future and RAK Innovation City intend to establish research and innovation centers collectively. They aim to leverage their technological capabilities, industrial resources, and ecosystem advantages to conduct research, testing, and practical applications in AI, embodied intelligence, and Web3 specifically within the UAE. The collaboration's ultimate goal is to develop an industrial ecosystem oriented towards the future. This news and further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: 2026 tech predictions by Futurum CEO and strategist include trillion-dollar IPOs from companies like SpaceX and OpenAI.
data.description: Daniel Newman, CEO of Futurum Research, and strategist Shay Boloor unveiled their top seven stock market forecasts for 2026. These projections shed light on enduring equity trends shaped by AI infrastructure, software platforms, increasing energy demand, and evolving capital allocation patterns. Notably, Amazon.com (NASDAQ: AMZN) and Meta Inc. (NASDAQ: META) are poised for substantial gains after trailing industry peers in the previous year. Concerns regarding AWS's AI infrastructure investments and Meta's talent expenses have eased, with both companies showing improvements in their strategies. The outlook suggests that these firms are set to emerge as key winners in 2026. SpaceX is anticipated to lead the IPO market in 2026, with a valuation exceeding $1 trillion, surpassing even OpenAI. Other notable IPOs to watch include Anthropic, Canva, and Databricks, with investor attention expected to focus on...

data.title: Edible Garden to send Pulp and Pickle Party to Western Beef in New York, meeting demand for clean-label foods.
data.description: The company has expanded its presence in the New York Metropolitan Area in response to the rising demand for clean-label, better-for-you foods. This strategic move comes as a result of the growing trend towards health-conscious consumption. The company's strengthened footprint in the region underscores its commitment to meeting the needs of consumers seeking healthier food options. The decision to increase focus in this area is supported by significant market data showing a steady increase in sales of clean-label and better-for-you products. This expansion aims to capitalize on the lucrative market potential in the New York Metropolitan Area and establish a stronger presence in the competitive food industry.

data.title: OBOOK Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: OWLS) to announce 1H 2025 financial results on Dec 30 after market close, with a 5pm ET webcast.
data.description: OBOOK Holdings Inc., listed on NASDAQ as OWLS, is set to announce its financial results for the first half of 2025 after the market closes on December 30. The disclosure will be accompanied by a webcast scheduled for 5pm Eastern Time.

data.title: Costco's quality score jumps to 94.90, in top 10 percentile of stocks, with Q1 earnings beating estimates.
data.description: This week, Costco Wholesale Corp. (NASDAQ: COST) achieved a significant milestone by entering the top tier of Benzinga Edge's Stock Rankings, with its quality score increasing from 86.58 to 94.90 in just one week. This places Costco in the top 10th percentile for fundamental strength, showcasing exceptional operational efficiency and financial health. In their fiscal first-quarter report, Costco exceeded both earnings and revenue expectations, driving this surge in quality ranking. The company reported impressive revenue of $67.31 billion, surpassing analyst estimates of $67.14 billion. Additionally, their adjusted earnings per share stood at $4.50, outperforming the projected $4.27. This strong performance solidifies Costco's position as a top-performing stock in the market. For more details, the complete story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rio Silver released a shareholder letter as silver hits record highs, focused on Maria Norte development & exploration in Peru and strategic assets in Canada's Ring of Fire, promising growth opportunities.
data.description: Key Points:1. The focus is on advancing development at Maria Norte in Peru.2. Significant potential for exploration in the region.3. A strategic advantage is gained from Canada's Ring of Fire critical minerals asset. In more detail:The company is prioritizing the near-term development of Maria Norte in Peru, emphasizing its potential for growth and development. There is a district-scale exploration opportunity in Peru, offering significant upside potential for the company. Additionally, the strategic optionality stemming from Canada's Ring of Fire critical minerals asset provides the company with a competitive edge in the market. These assets are central to the company's growth strategy and offer diverse opportunities for expansion and advancement in the industry.

data.title: Stardust Power gets funds to push Oklahoma lithium refinery towards construction, setting sights on progress.
data.description: According to recent data, approximately 3,500 new COVID-19 cases have been reported in the past week. This marks a significant increase from the previous week, where only 1,200 cases were recorded. Health officials are attributing this surge to the new Delta variant, which is said to be more transmissible. Hospitalizations have also seen a rise, with 200 new admissions in the last seven days. Authorities are urging the public to continue following safety protocols such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: CompoSecure, Inc. has received approval to issue shares for business combo with Husky Technologies. Expected to close in Jan. 2026.
data.description: In Somerset, New Jersey on December 24, 2025, CompoSecure, Inc. revealed that shareholders have given the green light for the issuance of CompoSecure Class A Common Stock shares linked to the upcoming merger with Husky Technologies Limited ("Husky"). The anticipated merger with Husky is on track to finalize in January 2026, pending standard closing prerequisites and regulatory green lights. CompoSecure, trading under NYSE: CMPO, shared this update, marking a significant step towards the forthcoming collaboration with Husky.

data.title: Digi Power X updates shareholders on 2025 highlights and strategic plan; refers to news release in Nov 2025 prospectus.
data.description: This announcement is considered a "designated news release" in relation to the Company's amended and restated prospectus supplement from November 18, 2025, connected to its short form base shelf prospectus revealed on May 15, 2025.
